meta.title: AYILand · Beta Program
meta.description: Join the first 500 Ayiland users. Selection in 7 days.

ayi.name: AYI · Your guide
ayi.intro: Hi! I'm Ayi. Ready to join the adventure?

step1.title: Connect your LinkedIn
step1.ayiMessage: Let's start with LinkedIn. Connect your account so we can verify your profile.

step2.title: Connect your X account
step2.ayiMessage: Now X. Connect your account and follow @ayitech.

step3.title: Your contact info
step3.ayiMessage: Just your contact info left. We'll reach out here if you're selected.

step4.title: Review your application
step4.ayiMessage: All good? Submit your application and fingers crossed!

alreadySubmitted.title: You've already applied!
alreadySubmitted.subtitle: All quests have been completed for this application.
alreadySubmitted.body: If we add new quests later, they'll appear here automatically when you come back with this email.
alreadySubmitted.shareText: I applied to Ayiland's beta program 🚀 Join me:

success.title: Application received!
success.subtitle: We'll get back to you within 7 days by email
success.shareText: I just applied to the Ayiland beta 🌊

share.linkedin: Just applied to the Ayiland private beta — 500 spots, that's it. If you like getting in before the rush, here's your shot 👇
share.twitter: Ayiland opened 500 beta spots. I'm in. What you waiting for? 🌊
share.whatsapp: Yo check this 👀 Ayiland just launched the beta — only 500 spots. I just applied. You gotta be in too: {url}
share.referralHint: Anyone who signs up via this link shows up in your referrals. +100 XP per confirmed referral.

leaderboard.title: Top referrers
leaderboard.subtitle: The ambassadors spreading Ayiland
leaderboard.noteSelection: Final selection stays at the team's discretion — referrals are a visible bonus, not a guaranteed access.
leaderboard.emptyBody: The board will appear as the first top referrers emerge. You can start inviting now!

displayMode.label: How you appear on the leaderboard

gate.title: Let's begin
gate.subtitle: Enter your email to start or resume your application
gate.savedHint: You have an in-progress application under this email. Picking up where you left off.

upload.label: Screenshot: prove you follow @ayitech
upload.dropHere: Drop here or click to choose

admin.title: Ayiland Admin
admin.loginSubtitle: Enter the password to access the dashboard

quests.subtitle: Add or edit custom quests. Built-in quests are locked.
quests.empty: No custom quests yet. Click "New quest" to add one.

errors.submitFailed: Submission failed. Please try again shortly.
errors.alreadySubmitted: You have already applied with this account.
